# GitBranchPlus

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="GitBranchPlus icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="GitBranchPlus" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; alt="GitBranchPlus icon"></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-controls"><label><span class="dioxus-icons-widget-label">Size</span><input data-di-size="true" type="number" min="1" max="256" aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Tags
code, version control, vcs, repository, add, create, +

## Categories
development

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/git-branch-plus)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::GitBranchPlus;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        GitBranchPlus { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
